Federal Benefits

Federal Employee Benefits

FERS done right. By people who actually know the system.

Pension timing, TSP strategy, FEHB vs. Medicare, survivor elections, and the mistakes that cost federal employees hundreds of thousands in retirement.

SDBA

Self-Directed Brokerage Accounts

Take control of the money in your 401(k).

If your employer plan offers an SDBA window, you can move beyond the default fund menu into a professionally managed portfolio — without leaving your plan.

Learn how SDBA works

100% Complimentary Webinar

Federal Benefits
Webinar:
Live Online Masterclass

Thursday, May 14th • 6:00 PM – 8:00 PM MT

Interactive live webinar covering the Federal Employees Retirement System (FERS), Thrift Savings Plan (TSP), Federal Employees Health Benefits (FEHB), Federal Employees Group Life Insurance (FEGLI), and Social Security — plus open Q&A with Ann Werts.

Open to all federal employees — VA, DoD, IRS, USDA, DOI, DHS and beyond.

Ann Werts

Webinar Instructor

15+ years helping federal employees understand their benefits with personalized guidance and live Q&A.

Limited Live Seats

Reserve Your Seat

Live Online Masterclass — Thursday, May 14, 2026.

100% complimentary live webinar — no cost, no obligation, no sales pitch. Replay sent to all registrants.

Guest Information

Privacy Protected & No-Obligation Educational Event
We will not sell your information or send unsolicited communications.

Curriculum

Federal Benefits Webinar Agenda

Two hours of focused education plus live Q&A. We cover the four pillars of your federal benefits package and how they integrate with Social Security in retirement.

CH. 01

Federal Employees Retirement System (FERS)

Deep dive into the three-part system: pension calculations, MRA + 10 vs. immediate retirement, the FERS supplement, survivor benefits, and timing your retirement window. Interactive Q&A: general questions about FERS strategies and timing.

Pension Calculations FERS Supplement Survivor Benefits
CH. 02

Thrift Savings Plan (TSP)

Contribution and matching strategies, fund selection (G/F/C/S/I + lifecycle), the Mutual Fund Window, withdrawal options, Roth vs. traditional, and TSP-to-IRA rollover considerations. Interactive Discussion: general TSP strategies and best practices.

Contributions Investment Strategy Withdrawals
CH. 03

FEHB & Medicare

Carrying FEHB into retirement, the 5-year rule, Medicare coordination, premium-sharing math, and how FEHB interacts with Part A, Part B, and IRMAA brackets. Q&A Focus: general health benefits scenarios and Medicare timing.

FEHB Medicare Timing IRMAA
CH. 04

FEGLI & Social Security

Basic Life, Option A/B/C, the post-65 cost cliff, and when private term beats FEGLI; plus Social Security strategy: WEP/GPO, claiming windows, and integrating Social Security with your FERS pension. General Review: coverage options, costs, and SS integration.

Life Insurance Social Security WEP/GPO
Your Webinar Instructor

Ann Werts

Ann has 15+ years of experience helping federal employees understand their benefits. Her expertise has provided education and guidance to thousands of government employees both while they're working and as they approach retirement.

How It Works

Live Online Webinar
— join from anywhere

Streamed via Zoom Webinars. We'll send your unique join link the day of the event, plus a calendar invite immediately after registration.

Date

Thursday, May 14, 2026

🕕
Time

6:00 PM – 8:00 PM Mountain
(8:00 PM ET / 5:00 PM PT)

💻
Platform

Zoom Webinars — works on phone, tablet, or desktop. No Zoom account needed.

▶️
Replay

What to Expect

Session Information

~90 min teach + 30 min live Q&A
Free to attend — no cost, no obligation
Spouses & partners encouraged to join
One-on-one help available after the webinar

Frequently Asked Questions

Is this affiliated with OPM?

No, this is an independent educational webinar. We provide non-biased, fiduciary guidance that is not limited by government handbook scripts.

Can I bring my spouse?

Absolutely — we encourage it. Retirement is a joint decision, especially regarding FEHB, Survivor Benefits, and Social Security claiming.

Will I be sold financial products?

This session is purely educational. No financial products will be offered or sold during the webinar. Our goal is clarity, not solicitation.

What if I can't attend live?

Register anyway — we'll email the full replay to every registrant within 48 hours of the live event.

Do I need a Zoom account?

No. You'll get a unique join link the day of the event that works in any modern browser, or in the Zoom app if you prefer.

Is this only for FERS employees?

FERS is the focus, but CSRS and CSRS Offset employees will get value too — especially around Social Security WEP/GPO, FEHB, and FEGLI.

Confirm Registration

Federal Benefits Educational Webinar

Important Disclaimer: This educational webinar is not affiliated with or endorsed by the U.S. Government, Social Security Administration, Office of Personnel Management, or any federal agency. This is an independent educational event provided by Capital Wealth, a registered investment advisor. All information presented is for educational purposes only and should not be considered official government guidance.
